rows.ad_text: Fresh organic produce delivered this week.
Join this summer and get one free month.

rows.text_caption:
Countdown is on!:  4 days until Israel's biggest hockey rivalry returns to UBS Arena - this Sunday, 5PM! (home of the NY Islanders.)

🎟 Some areas selling out, Few VIP all-you-can-eat still available- click on section 104 rows 16-19.
CBN got wind of this promo discount code, JHUNDF which should be working for a discount if discounted tickets are still remaining.

🎟 Get tickets: https://bit.ly/IEHLCBN


🇮🇱 Get out and support our brothers! You're seeing it all over, the Islanders and the IEHL put on a world class event: don't miss it! Ask those that were at last year's game: the atmosphere is awesome, and affordable. Want something to entertain your kids with in the middle of winter? 

Of course -hoping for another on-ice fight again this year 😉
rows.title: The Rematch - Hocky Game
